data.title: Melar Acquisition Corp. I and Everli Global Inc. submit Form S-4 for proposed business combination.
data.description: New York and Milan - Melar Acquisition Corp. I (NASDAQ: MACI) and Everli Global Inc. have revealed a significant development. Melar, a publicly traded special purpose acquisition company, and Everli, a leading e-grocery platform in Italy, have announced that Melar has confidentially submitted a draft registration statement on Form S-4 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This submission is part of the planned business combination between Melar and Everli, termed the "Proposed Transaction." This move marks a pivotal step in the strategic partnership between the two entities.
In Abu Dhabi, tripartite negotiations between Russia, the United States, and Ukraine have begun, according to Sky News.

data.title: CTOs are key in driving sustainability efforts, with 95% actively involved. 84% of businesses integrate sustainability in R&D but only 38% in standard decision-making. Data availability challenges AI adoption.
data.description: More than 95% of Chief Technology Officers (CTOs) are actively involved in promoting sustainability initiatives within their organizations. A study found that 84% of businesses prioritize sustainability in their research and development (R&D) decisions. Surprisingly, only 38% of companies have integrated sustainability into their standard decision-making processes. Despite the significance of artificial intelligence (AI) in advancing sustainability efforts, 38% of CTOs state that challenges related to data availability hinder progress in this area.

data.title: transcosmos partners with Chinese lingerie brand LING LINGERIE for entry into Japan, targeting Gen Z market.
data.description: transcosmos unveiled a recent collaboration with LING LINGERIE, a prominent Chinese luxury lingerie brand catering to Gen Z preferences, aimed at enhancing brand visibility. The strategic alliance will assist LING LINGERIE in amplifying its reach and securing a stronger foothold in the market. With this partnership, transcosmos aims to augment brand awareness and recognition for the flourishing Chinese lingerie brand.

data.title: Cerrado Gold responds to critique of Environmental Impact Assessment for Lagoa Salgada Project in Portugal.
data.description: Cerrado Gold has issued a response to a purportedly negative review of the Environmental Impact Assessment for their Lagoa Salgada Project in Portugal. The company states that the assessment is favorable and highlights the project's positive impact. The project, located in Portugal, aims to bring economic benefits to the region. Cerrado Gold emphasizes that the assessment reflects a thorough evaluation of the project's environmental effects, emphasizing its commitment to sustainable practices. The company remains confident in the potential of the project to contribute to the local economy and create jobs.

data.title: Coforge reports strong performance with revenue up 5.1% QoQ, 28.5% YoY, and 37.3% YTD.
data.description: Coforge, based in Princeton, New Jersey and New Delhi, experienced strong growth in the latest quarter. Their revenue increased by 5.1% quarter-over-quarter, 28.5% year-over-year, and reached a notable 37.3% year-to-date.

data.title: Weekly recap: 13 press releases featuring top companies like Netflix and Build-A-Bear.
data.description: In a recent update, Netflix has made an offer to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, adding to the list of the world's most esteemed companies. Additionally, Build-A-Bear has introduced a range of new products along with the return of popular items, joining the trend set by Red Bull and OREO. The news, dated January 23, 2026, from New York, encompasses the latest developments in the business world where companies compete, innovate, and capture the attention of consumers and investors.

data.title: Kansas legislators suggest creating a state-run reserve fund for Bitcoin and digital assets, aiming to hold abandoned assets and staking rewards.
data.description: The plan aims to have state custody of dormant digital assets, enabling staking rewards to be directed into a reserve fund.

data.title: Robo.ai teams up with The Ghazi Group to expand AI compute infrastructure in MENA and Southeast Asia. (Characters: 108)
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on January 23, 2026, Robo.ai Inc. (Nasdaq: AIIO), a firm known for AI-powered autonomous technologies, disclosed a significant development. This involves a newly established three-year Gold Reseller Agreement with The Ghazi Group ("TGG"), a comprehensive AI infrastructure and solutions firm. Under this agreement, Robo.ai Inc. will collaborate closely with TGG to provide advanced AI solutions to the market.

data.title: NJ man gets 12-yr sentence for buying fentanyl with Bitcoin. Drug scheme spread counterfeit pills in NJ; 8 others pleaded guilty.
data.description: A network operating in New Jersey distributed counterfeit pharmaceutical pills as part of a scheme, with eight co-defendants admitting guilt so far.
